<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/commonmark package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\CommonMark\Extension\Embed; /** * Interface for a service which updates the embed code(s) for the given array of embeds */ interface EmbedAdapterInterface { /** * @param Embed[] $embeds */ public function updateEmbeds(array $embeds): void; }
